/usr/bin/ar qc libdatcore.a CMakeFiles/datcore.dir/src/dat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/datcore.dir/src/xentax.cpp.o CMakeFiles/datcore.dir/src/murmur3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/datcore.dir/src/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/datcore.dir/src/atex_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/datcore.dir/src/atex_decompress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/datcore.dir/src/texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/datcore.dir/src/catalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/datcore.dir/src/atex_stub.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libdatcore.a
